# Overview

## Import Package


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
pacman::p_load(ggstatsplot, tidyverse,ggrepel, patchwork, janitor,colorspaces,ggstatsplot,ggdist,ggridges,FunnelPlotR,knitr,gganimate,gifski,gapminder,
               ggthemes, hrbrthemes,
               tidyverse,readxl)
```
:::


## Import Data


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
df_raw <- read_excel("data/Database paper.xlsx") %>%
  janitor::clean_names()
df_raw
```
